case_title: COLETTE ZEE VS. ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO THIRD PARTY ESQUIVEL, AARON HEARING SET FOR SEP-12-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $500) SERVED JUL-29-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, AARON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2021 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON AUG-26-2021)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZEE, COLETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00, PLAINTIFF'S AWARD IS REDUCED BECAUSE THE DRIVER WAS CONTRIBUTORILY NEGLIGENT FOR SOME OF THE ACCIDENT. DEFENDANT IS LIABLE FOR THE ACTS OF THE TRAFFIC CONTROLLER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ZEE, COLETTE AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF COLETTE ZEE IS PRESENT. CHRISTOPHER HERRICK, PLAINTIFF'S SON AND DRIVER OF PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE AT THE TIME OF THE ACCIDENT, PROVIDES TESTIMONY ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. JACKSON HERRICK, SON AND VEHICLE PASSENGER AT THE TIME OF THE ACCIDENT, TESTIFES FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC., REPRESENTED BY AARON ESQUIVEL, CO-OWNER IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $40) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZEE, COLETTE AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, AARON

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR COLETTE ZEE IS PRESENT. RICK HERRICK, PLAINTIFF'S HUSBAND IS ALSO PRESENT. DEFENDANT/ JUDGMENT DEBTOR ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY AUDREY KAILI, BUSINESS OPERATIONS. THIRD PARTY DEFENDANT AARON ESQUIVEL IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS AGREED TO PAY THE JUDGMENT AMOUNT WITHIN 30 DAYS TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR BY CHECK. CREDITOR'S CURRENT MAILING INFORMATION IS PROVIDED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO SEND PAYMENT. SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WILL BE FILED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ONCE PAYMENT IS RECEIVED. (SEE NOTES). JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY ESQUIVEL, AARON HEARING SET FOR JUL-07-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZEE, COLETTE AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, AARON
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) AUDREY E. KAILI, BUSINESS OPERATIONS. FILED BY DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED JUN-21-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) AARON ESQUIVEL, VICE PRESIDENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL GRADING & PAVING, INC.
